videos.headline: Ohio State celebrates CFP title
videos.description: Ohio State begins to celebrate after beating Notre Dame to win the College Football Playoff championship.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ohio State celebrates CFP title) 2025/01/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ohio State hoists up CFP trophy
videos.description: The Ohio State Buckeyes hoist up the College Football Playoff trophy after defeating Notre Dame.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Ohio State hoists up CFP trophy) 2025/01/20

videos.headline: Riley Leonard converts 4th-and-1 on Notre Dame's opening drive
videos.description: Riley Leonard keeps the ball and runs for a first down on Notre Dame's opening drive.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Riley Leonard converts 4th-and-1 on Notre Dame's opening drive) 2025/01/20

videos.headline: Riley Leonard converts another 4th down, then scores a TD
videos.description: Notre Dame QB Riley Leonard converts another fourth down on the opening drive, then scores a touchdown on the next play.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Riley Leonard converts another 4th down, then scores a TD) 2025/01/20

videos.headline: Riley Leonard gassed after historic opening drive
videos.description: Notre Dame QB Riley Leonard looks noticeably gassed after leading the Fighting Irish on a record 18-play drive for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Riley Leonard gassed after historic opening drive) 2025/01/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jeremiah Smith walks in for a Buckeyes TD
videos.description: Ohio State QB Will Howard tosses to an open Jeremiah Smith, who waltzes in for a touchdown to tie the score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jeremiah Smith walks in for a Buckeyes TD) 2025/01/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Emeka Egbuka sets Ohio State career receptions record
videos.description: Ohio State WR Emeka Egbuka secures his 202nd career reception for the Buckeyes, setting a program record.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Emeka Egbuka sets Ohio State career receptions record) 2025/01/20

videos.headline: Quinshon Judkins stiff-arms his way for an OSU TD
videos.description: Ohio State RB Quinshon Judkins stiff-arms a defender en route to a 9-yard touchdown for the Buckeyes.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quinshon Judkins stiff-arms his way for an OSU TD) 2025/01/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: LeBron amped up after OSU's TD
videos.description: Ohio State QB Will Howard connects with Quinshon Judkins for a touchdown that has LeBron James excited from the suites.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LeBron amped up after OSU's TD) 2025/01/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quinshon Judkins breaks free for a 70-yard run
videos.description: Quinshon Judkins gets loose for a 70-yard rush to set up Ohio State in the red zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quinshon Judkins breaks free for a 70-yard run) 2025/01/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quinshon Judkins rumbles in for his 3rd TD of the game
videos.description: Quinshon Judkins powers his way into the end zone to give Ohio State a 28-7 lead over Notre Dame.

tracking.trackingName: evc_20250120_osu_vs_nd_ecc26fdd-e40f-4e37-a978-e4374eeaa1e9_14141

videos.headline: Notre Dame's fake punt fails on 4th down
videos.description: Notre Dame tries to catch Ohio State sleeping by faking a punt on fourth down, but Steve Angeli's pass falls incomplete as the Buckeyes take over.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Notre Dame's fake punt fails on 4th down) 2025/01/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quinshon Judkins' 70-yard run sets up his 3rd TD of game
videos.description: Quinshon Judkins breaks free for a 70-yard rush, then forces his way into the end zone for his 3rd touchdown of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quinshon Judkins' 70-yard run sets up his 3rd TD of game) 2025/01/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Notre Dame's Jaden Greathouse spins past defender on way to TD
videos.description: Jaden Greathouse scores a 34-yard touchdown after spinning past an Ohio State defender.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Notre Dame's Jaden Greathouse spins past defender on way to TD) 2025/01/20

videos.headline: Notre Dame forces crucial turnover to start 4th quarter
videos.description: Notre Dame's Drayk Bowen punches the ball out of Ohio State's Emeka Egbuka's hands and the Fighting Irish recover the loose ball.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Notre Dame forces crucial turnover to start 4th quarter) 2025/01/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Notre Dame's FG attempt doinks off the uprights
videos.description: Mitch Jeter attempts a 27-yard field goal to bring Notre Dame closer, but it doinks off the left upright.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Notre Dame's FG attempt doinks off the uprights) 2025/01/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Notre Dame has life after stellar TD grab, trick-play conversion
videos.description: Jaden Greathouse reels in a 30-yard touchdown from Riley Leonard, then the Fighting Irish convert on their 2-point conversion to make it a one-possession game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Notre Dame has life after stellar TD grab, trick-play conversion) 2025/01/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jeremiah Smith hauls in clutch 56-yard grab for Ohio State
videos.description: Ohio State QB Will Howard connects with Jeremiah Smith for a huge 56-yard catch late in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jeremiah Smith hauls in clutch 57-yard grab for Ohio State) 2025/01/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ryan Day elated after Ohio State's FG ices CFP title game
videos.description: Jayden Fielding ices the College Football Playoff championship game with a 33-yard field goal, and coach Ryan Day is elated.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ryan Day elated after Ohio State's FG ices CFP title game) 2025/01/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ryan Day reflects on Ohio State's national title
videos.description: Ryan Day describes what it took for Ohio State to overcome adversity and become CFP national champions.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ryan Day reflects on Ohio State's national title) 2025/01/20

videos.headline: Will Howard at a loss for words after Ohio State's CFP title
videos.description: Ohio State QB Will Howard reflects on leading the Buckeyes to a College Football Playoff championship.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (Will Howard at a loss for words after Ohio State's CFP title) 2025/01/20

videos.headline: Marcus Freeman 'so proud' of Notre Dame's season
videos.description: Notre Dame coach Marcus Freeman reflects on losing to Ohio State in the College Football Playoff Championship Game.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (Marcus Freeman 'so proud' of Notre Dame's season) 2025/01/20

videos.headline: Herbstreit emotional after Ohio State's win: 'They went to hell and back'
videos.description: Kirk Herbstreit reflects on Ohio State's inspiring journey to victory, sharing his emotional reaction after the Buckeyes' hard-fought win.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Analysis(Herbstreit emotional after Ohio State's win: 'They went to hell and back') 2025/01/02 SVP

videos.headline: Finebaum: The Big Ten owns college football
videos.description: Paul Finebaum has Mike Greenberg dancing after admitting the Big Ten owns college football following Ohio State's title win.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Analysis (Finebaum: The Big Ten owns college football) 2025/1/21 ESHEET Get Up
